signals.headline: Trump Claims Iran Wants Ceasefire Deal 'Very Badly' Despite Failed Talks and US Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | NO | HIGH
signals.raw:
Trump Claims Iran Wants Ceasefire Deal 'Very Badly' Despite Failed Talks and US Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | NO | HIGH confidence**

US-Iran ceasefire talks collapsed over the weekend in Pakistan, with no agreement reached primarily due to Iran's refusal to abandon nuclear ambitions[2][1]. President Trump announced a US Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, effective last night (April 13, 2026)
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY (Up from 2.00% in Feb)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]

South Korea's Consumer Price Index reached 118.8 in March 2026, with year-over-year inflation rising to 2.16% from 2.00% the prior month and month-over-month inflation at 0.34%[1]. This fresh data release exceeds the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid oil price pressures, following the B
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
